scripts.build: npm run auto:firebase production && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:dev: npm run detect:ip && npm run auto:firebase development && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:staging: npm run auto:firebase staging && ng build --configuration staging
scripts.build:staging-debug: npm run auto:firebase staging && ng build --configuration staging-debug
scripts.ios:staging-debug: npm run build:staging-debug && npx cap sync ios && npm run auto:firebase staging && npx cap run ios
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npm run auto:firebase production && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run auto:firebase production
scripts.ios:dev: npm run build:dev && npx cap sync ios && npm run auto:firebase development && npx cap run ios
scripts.android:dev: npm run build:dev && npx cap sync android && npm run auto:firebase development && npx cap run android
scripts.ios:staging: npm run build:staging && npx cap sync ios && npm run auto:firebase staging && npx cap run ios
scripts.android:staging: npm run build:staging && npx cap sync android && npm run auto:firebase staging && npx cap run android
scripts.ios:live: npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios --live-reload
scripts.android:live: npx cap sync android && npx cap run android --live-reload
